offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month, inaccurate payroll tax filings cause compliance issues. We automate data extraction and reporting instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet tracking.
problem: Inaccurate payroll tax filings lead to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll solutions
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry support on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing payroll data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
Minimize steps required during onboarding process
